__fixture__.name: conformance_blockers_present
__fixture__.scenario: A failed blocker check and a blocking required shim both fire, so the report is blocked on conformance before publish.

checks.title: Privileged permission is missing a purpose
checks.message: The 'network_egress' permission does not declare a user-facing purpose.
checks.required_fix: Add a 'purpose' string explaining why network egress is needed.
checks.repro_guidance: Open the manifest editor and inspect the second permission row; the purpose chip is empty.

checks.title: Disable and rollback metadata present
checks.message: The manifest declares a disable path and a rollback target.

required_shims.reason: The artifact targets an older host ABI window than the declared minimum.

compatibility.migration_impact_summary: A removed world and a required ABI shim must be resolved before publish.
